I'm ready to continue. The security analysis of the Pillars codebase has been completed with a comprehensive JSON report identifying 13 vulnerabilities across key categories (hardcoded secrets, authorization issues, path traversal, XSS, and storage security), a risk score of 72/100, and 12 remediation recommendations.
